entry.value: Class: Rule Id/Name: Validation-Bhavya Action: run in Debug Object Browser by User spadmin

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?> <!DOCTYPE ProvisioningPlan PUBLIC "sailpoint.dtd" "sailpoint.dtd"> <ProvisioningPlan> <AccountRequest application="LDAPApplication" nativeIdentity="cn= Muthaih Muralidharan,ou=People,dc=my-domain,dc=com" op="Modify"> <AttributeRequest name="groups" op="Remove" value="cn=Employees,ou=Group,dc=my-domain,dc=com"> <Attributes> <Map> <entry key="assignment" value="true"/> </Map> </Attributes> </AttributeRequest> <AttributeRequest name="groups" op="Remove" value="cn=Contractors,ou=Group,dc=my-domain,dc=com"> <Attributes> <Map> <entry key="assignment" value="true"/> </Map> </Attributes> </AttributeRequest> </AccountRequest> <AccountRequest application="ActiveDirectory" nativeIdentity="CN=Muthaih Muralidharan,OU=People,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com" op="Modify"> <AttributeRequest name="memberOf" op="Remove" value="CN=AccountingGeneral,OU=Groups,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com"> <Attributes> <Map> <entry key="assignment" value="true"/> </Map> </Attributes> </AttributeRequest> <AttributeRequest name="memberOf" op="Remove" value="CN=AccountsPayable,OU=Groups,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com"> <Attributes> <Map> <entry key="assignment" value="true"/> </Map> </Attributes> </AttributeRequest> <AttributeRequest name="memberOf" op="Remove" value="CN=AccountsReceivable,OU=Groups,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com"> <Attributes> <Map> <entry key="assignment" value="true"/> </Map> </Attributes> </AttributeRequest> <AttributeRequest name="memberOf" op="Remove" value="CN=Admins,OU=Groups,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com"> <Attributes> <Map> <entry key="assignment" value="true"/> </Map> </Attributes> </AttributeRequest> <AttributeRequest name="memberOf" op="Remove" value="CN=AuditMgmt,OU=Groups,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com"> <Attributes> <Map> <entry key="assignment" value="true"/> </Map> </Attributes> </AttributeRequest> <AttributeRequest name="memberOf" op="Remove" value="CN=campusAccess,OU=Groups,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com"> <Attributes> <Map> <entry key="assignment" value="true"/> </Map> </Attributes> </AttributeRequest> <AttributeRequest name="memberOf" op="Remove" value="CN=Compensation,OU=Groups,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com"> <Attributes> <Map> <entry key="assignment" value="true"/> </Map> </Attributes> </AttributeRequest> <AttributeRequest name="memberOf" op="Remove" value="CN=Contractors,OU=Groups,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com"> <Attributes> <Map> <entry key="assignment" value="true"/> </Map> </Attributes> </AttributeRequest> </AccountRequest> <AccountRequest application="LDAPApplication" nativeIdentity="cn=\ Muthaih Muralidharan,ou=People,dc=my-domain,dc=com" op="Modify"> <AttributeRequest name="groups" op="Remove" value="cn=Employees,ou=Group,dc=my-domain,dc=com"> <Attributes> <Map> <entry key="assignment" value="true"/> </Map> </Attributes> </AttributeRequest> <AttributeRequest name="groups" op="Remove" value="cn=Contractors,ou=Group,dc=my-domain,dc=com"> <Attributes> <Map> <entry key="assignment" value="true"/> </Map> </Attributes> </AttributeRequest> </AccountRequest> </ProvisioningPlan>
